lib__parent-ui__parent-report-approved-c.there_are_only_a_few_questions_on_this_t: There are only a few questions on this topic, so it is still early to draw a strong conclusion.

lib__parent-ui__parent-report-approved-c.pause_after_a_mistake_and_ask_the_child_: Pause after a mistake and ask the child to explain how they reached the answer.

lib__parent-ui__parent-report-approved-c.practice_the_specific_pairs_that_keep_co: Practice the specific pairs that keep coming up wrong, out loud and as a quick game.

utils__parent-report-diagnostic-restrain.what_is_shown_here_is_plausible_but_not_: What is shown here is plausible but not final — follow up rather than acting on a sharp assumption.

utils__parent-report-engine-v1-signals.do_not_emit_subskillcandidate_when_taxon: Do not emit subskillCandidate when taxonomyMatch is false or matchStrength is weak.
utils__parent-report-engine-v1-signals.when_engineconfidencetier_is_t0_5_questi: When engineConfidenceTier is T0 (<5 questions), engineDecision stays insufficient_data.
utils__parent-report-engine-v1-signals.when_speedonlyrisk_and_mode_is_speed_mar: When speedOnlyRisk and mode is speed/marathon and accuracyBand is not clear_gap, do not infer knowledge_gap.

utils__parent-report-evidence-targets.fewer_mid_task_stops_when_the_instructio: Fewer mid-task stops when the instructions are clear.
utils__parent-report-evidence-targets.the_same_difficulty_level_with_similar_r: The same difficulty level with similar results across two consecutive sessions.

utils__parent-report-foundation-ordering.at_the_same_time_keep_a_narrow_goal_in_t: At the same time, keep a narrow goal in the topic - not two heavy loads.

utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.small_consistency_same_level_with_fewer_: Small consistency: same level with fewer repeated mistakes.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_frustration_or_pushback_shows_up_stop: If frustration or pushback shows up — stop and shorten further.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.after_2_3_short_sessions_we_can_see_if_t: After 2–3 short sessions we can see if the pattern repeats — then tighten the focus.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_every_session_turns_into_a_struggle_c: If every session turns into a struggle — cut to 5–7 minutes and try again tomorrow.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.short_measurable_practice_same_task_same: Short, measurable practice: same task, same level, emphasize reading before answering.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_draw_deep_conclusions_or_raise_th: Do not draw deep conclusions or raise the level based on a single result.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.when_accuracy_holds_without_time_pressur: When accuracy holds without time pressure — gradually return to a faster track.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_the_child_rushes_again_briefly_return: If the child rushes again — briefly return to untimed practice.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.one_short_untimed_practice_with_a_pause_: One short untimed practice, with a pause before submitting.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_turn_a_speed_weakness_into_a_subj: Do not turn a speed weakness into a subject-wide level drop, and do not push for records.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.when_the_child_starts_pausing_alone_befo: When the child starts pausing alone before answering — the load is easing.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_you_stay_stuck_on_hints_shorten_the_t: If you stay stuck on hints — shorten the task and return tomorrow.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.short_task_clear_wording_fewer_long_expl: Short task, clear wording, fewer long explanations during practice.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_over_explain_every_item_when_the_: Do not over-explain every item when the hard part is understanding the task.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.when_the_child_mostly_finishes_stage_b_a: When the child mostly finishes stage B alone — expand a little.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_independence_drops_and_mistakes_rise_: If independence drops and mistakes rise — return to more guidance for a week.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_move_to_advanced_before_two_consi: Do not move to advanced before two consistent sessions with reasonable independence.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.when_that_mistake_type_disappears_across: When that mistake type disappears across two sessions in a row — a sign of stabilization.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_there_is_no_improvement_after_two_wee: If there is no improvement after two weeks of consistency — pause and review level or wording.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.focused_review_of_similar_mistakes_at_th: Focused review of similar mistakes at the same difficulty.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_skip_foundations_or_open_too_many: Do not skip foundations or open too many topics at once.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.fewer_familiar_mistakes_same_task_type: Fewer "familiar" mistakes on the same task type.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_mistakes_run_deeper_than_carelessness: If mistakes run deeper than carelessness — shift to concept reinforcement.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.every_task_includes_a_short_check_pause_: Every task includes a short check pause before finishing.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_assume_a_deep_knowledge_gap_when_: Do not assume a deep knowledge gap when there is partial mastery.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.when_two_sessions_in_a_row_look_similar_: When two sessions in a row look similar — pick one direction.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_the_picture_changes_a_lot_between_ses: If the picture changes a lot between sessions — stay with short practice and watch, without a big change.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.continue_at_the_same_level_and_check_acc: Continue at the same level and check accuracy after each session.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_lock_onto_a_single_explanation_wh: Do not lock onto a single explanation when signals conflict.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.small_consistent_improvement_in_accuracy: Small, consistent improvement in accuracy or fewer repeated mistakes.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.if_there_is_no_movement_after_two_weeks_: If there is no movement after two weeks — update how practice is run.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.short_steady_practice_around_the_same_le: Short, steady practice around the same level.
utils__parent-report-intervention-plan.do_not_pile_on_big_goals_while_the_pictu: Do not pile on big goals while the picture is still forming.
